{{Infobox character
| name = Urg’naut
| aliases = Urg'naut
| children = {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Imperial Steward Calder Marten|Calder Marten]]}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Great Elder]]}}{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|, [[Creeping Shadow]]}}{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|, Great Elder of Annihilation}}
| appears_in = Elder Empire
| introduced = [[Of Sea and Shadow (novel)|Of Sea and Shadow]]
}}

''See also: [[Urg’naut Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Urg’naut is a [[Great Elder]] known as the embodiment of death, absence, and annihilation. Often referred to as the [[Creeping Shadow]], this entity pursues absolute nothingness and seeks to bring about a state of nonexistence. Unlike other [[Great Elders]] who may act with specific motives like the pursuit of knowledge or balance, Urg’naut's primary drive is to erase all things from existence. This destructive nature extends even to its own kind, as the entity aims for total annihilation. Urg’naut's influence is manifested through shadows that can devour the minds of victims or cause them to simply cease existing. The entity's presence is characterized by an insatiable, endless hunger and a shadow that resembles a mass of twisting serpents. While Urg’naut can take a host body—appearing as a man in silver armor with a face like an endless black hole or sun—its power is immense; while possessing a human form, it was capable of instantly erasing vast portions of the ocean and the [[Capital]]. The entity is also known to utilize spawns that serve its purpose, though these servants do not necessarily kill their targets, instead facilitating their disappearance into the [[void]].}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Urg’naut]] works for a peace he defines as nonexistence.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c28">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 28</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|There is a ruined city over [[Urg’naut]]’s corpse.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c28" />}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Urg’naut]] is a creature [[Shera]] cursed [[Meia]] to be devoured by.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c16">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Urg’naut is a [[Great Elder]] associated with shadows and darkness. This potentially evil being seeks to destroy the world, pursuing a state of absolute nothingness that could result in the planet being devoured. As a threat that can be sealed, there are even beliefs that people might be fed to the entity.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Urg’naut]] is a place associated with darkness.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c2">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Urg’naut]] is a being that can be sealed.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c4">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Urg'naut wants to destroy the world.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c8">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Urg’naut]] is a threat that could devour the planet.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Urg’naut]] is a being that some believe people might be fed to.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c11">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Urg’naut]] is a [[Great Elder]] who may be actively evil.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c12">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Urg’naut]] is associated with shadows.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c17">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Urg’naut]] pursues absolute nothingness.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c24">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 24</ref>}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Located to the east, Urg’naut serves as both a specific location and an entity defined by an endless, insatiable hunger. Although his servant was once present, they have since been driven off. Among those who arrive at the site, one newcomer bears a head shrouded in remnants of the entity. Rather than engaging in traditional combat or killing, Urg’naut and his spawn possess the ability to cause people to simply cease to exist.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Urg'naut's prison is located to the east.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c6">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Urg'naut has an endless and insatiable hunger.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The servant of Urg'naut has been driven off.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|One of the newcomers has a head shrouded in remnants of Urg'naut.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c11">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Urg'naut is a location.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c15">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Urg'naut and his spawn do not kill or attack; they cause people to cease to exist.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c18">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Known as the [[Creeping Shadow]], Urg’naut is a [[Great Elder]] and the progenitor of [[Calder Marten]]. This silhouette of solid shadow, which represents death and absence through infinite shadows, is a dangerous ally that seeks the end. Upon being released, this entity of distant and alien malice approached the [[Capital]], attempting to take a host by slithering into a person. Urg’naut's presence is felt as a seething nest of twisting serpents and a face resembling an endless hole like a black sun. After attacking the [[Capital]], the mighty entity took human form and escaped, ultimately winning and erasing ten percent of the city.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder Marten]] is a spawn of Urg'naut.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c1">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Urg'naut is a being that can find [[Calder]] in the [[void]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c11">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Urg’naut]] is known as the [[Creeping Shadow]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Urg’naut]] is a silhouette of solid shadow.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c19">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Urg'naut is described as a dangerous ally who will seek the end.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c20">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Urg'naut is an entity whose stirring affects the world.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Urg’naut]] has been released.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c21">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Urg’naut]] is described as the darkness at the end of all things.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Urg’naut]]'s presence is felt as a passive [[Intent]] of distant and alien malice.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Urg'naut is a [[Great Elder]] who can approach the [[Capital]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Urg'naut attempts to take a host by slithering into a person.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] turned his focus back to [[Urg’naut]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Urg’naut]] is the embodiment of death and absence, represented by infinite shadows.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c22">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Urg'naut is facing down [[Jorin]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c22" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Urg'naut possesses a body with a face that is a black sun, an endless hole.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c22" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Urg’naut]] is a [[Great Elder]] who can withdraw his shadow into a twisting column.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c22" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Urg’naut]] is a [[Great Elder]] who can destroy the [[Capital]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c22" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Urg’naut]] is free.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c22" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Urg’naut]]'s shadow resembles a seething nest of twisting serpents.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c22" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Urg'naut is a place that causes dread and horror.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c22" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Urg’naut]] attacked the [[Capital]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c23">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Urg’naut]] took human form and escaped.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Urg'naut is associated with a primal fear and emptiness.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Someone is fighting [[Urg’naut]] in the sky.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Kelarac]]'s words brought up memories of [[Urg’naut]]’s emptiness.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c24">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Urg'naut is a threat that can devour thoughts.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c24" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The embodied [[Urg’naut]] is extremely mighty.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c24" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Kelarac]] showed [[Jerri]] what happened with [[Urg’naut]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c24" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Urg'naut won.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c25">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]]'s memory of seeing Urg'naut was fresh.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c25" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Urg’naut]] possessed a human body and erased ten percent of the [[Capital]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c26">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 26</ref>}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Urg’naut is a subtle force capable of tilting minds and was once invoked by [[Zhen]]. Known as the [[Great Elder]] of Annihilation, this entity is also a location that [[Loreli]] previously pierced. After promising [[Darius Allbright]] unending rest to save people from pain, the [[Great Elder]] whispered of bringing annihilation to all things before ascending into the [[void]] to meet the [[Outsider]]. Following a battle against an opponent of impossible power, Urg’naut escaped and eventually engaged in a fight with the [[Outsider]]. Although [[Shera]] claimed that Urg’naut was victorious, the entity has since departed.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Urg’naut]] can be subtle and tilts minds.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c6">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Zhen]] invokes [[Urg’naut]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c9">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Urg’naut]] is a location that [[Loreli]] once pierced.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c18">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Urg’naut]] is coming.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c22">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Urg’naut]] is the [[Great Elder]] of Annihilation.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c22" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Urg’naut]] wants to save people from pain.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c23">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Urg’naut]] is a [[Great Elder]] that spoke to [[Darius Allbright]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Urg’naut]] is a [[Great Elder]] who promised [[Darius]] unending rest.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Urg'naut whispered that they bring annihilation to all things.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Urg’naut]] ascended into the [[void]] to meet the [[Outsider]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Urg’naut]] is fighting an opponent of impossible power.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c24">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Urg’naut]] escaped.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c24" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Calder]] did not overhear Urg'naut.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c24" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Urg’naut]] is fighting the [[Outsider]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c25">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]] stated that [[Urg’naut]] won.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c25" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Urg’naut]] has departed.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c27">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 27</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|“Don’t worry. We know you can’t force Urg’naut back into his seal, or keep Ach’magut from rebuilding his library, or do anything useful.”<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c4" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|“A spawn of Urg’naut,” Calder Marten explained.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c1" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|“It’s here,” Calder whispered. “Urg’naut. He’s found me.”<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c11" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|"If Urg’naut really had been stirred up, their actions should remain the same."<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c20" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|“Urg’naut took human form and escaped,” Calder told her.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c23" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
